resources.string: Disable ad blocking for a specific site.
Enable ad blocking for a specific site.
Set user-agent for a specific site.
You need to agree and accept all the terms before you start using our service.
It has already been set as default
Are you sure you want to copy text from %DOMAIN%?
Enable blur effect for the app. Some devices may not support it.
Bookmarks data is too big to upload, but other data will be uploaded normally. Continue?
Allow a specific site to use your camera.
Block a specific site to use your camera.
Ask first before allowing sites to use your camera
It can be downloaded only from \"http\" or \"https\" URLs.
It can only work with \"http\" or \"https\" URLs.
It can only work if JavaScript is allowed.
It cannot work on this site.

ISSUED TO
Common Name (CN)
%1$s
Organization (O)
%2$s
Organizational Unit (OU)
%3$s

ISSUED BY
Common Name (CN)
%4$s
Organization (O)
%5$s

VALIDITY PERIOD
Issued On
%6$s
Expires On
%7$s
Permission denied. Would you like to set it in settings now?
Are you sure you want to clear search history?
Note that this will clear all the favorite icons on the homepage. Each icon will be downloaded the next time you visit the corresponding website.
Allow a specific site to use your clipboard.
Block a specific site to use your clipboard.
Allow sites to use your clipboard
Ask first before allowing sites to use your clipboard
Block sites to use your clipboard
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
Allow sites to save and read cookie data
We\'re sorry that the app crashed.
Including custom filters and marked ads
Delete the account from the server

After submitting the deletion request, the account will be logged out and enter a 15-day deletion waiting-period. If you log in to the account again and upload data during the waiting-period, your deletion request will be withdrawn. After the waiting-period expires, the account and related data will be completely deleted from the server.\nPlease enter your password to submit the request.
The account deletion request has been submitted.
Bookmarks in folder %1$s will also be deleted. Are you sure?
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s?
Are you sure you want to delete %1$d items?
Failed to delete. The file is located in download path:
Disable desktop mode for a specific site.
Enable desktop mode for a specific site.
Would you like to mark this as ad?
Would you like to download this file?
Are you sure you want to proceed?
Skip redirect page when third-party apps open links via Custom Tabs
Do not sell or share data
Request the website not to sell or share my data to protect privacy (experimental)
If you like Via browser, you can donate to support us.\nAlipay: 2376688759@qq.com\nPayPal: wiar1824@gmail.com
Built-in filters only block common ads
Allow swipe to adjust video progress, screen brightness, device volume when playing video in full screen if possible
You are exporting secret data, please enter a password to encrypt the data. Please remember the password. Once the password is lost, you will not be able to import the encrypted data.
All open tabs will be deleted and cannot be restored, are you sure to you want to exit app?
Expand collapsed content automatically when open a webpage
Export bookmarks, settings, scripts and ad filters
After you\'re done using the passwords file, delete it to avoid data leakage
When selecting an external video player to play the video, use
Subscribe to Adblock Plus filter lists
Follow system dark mode is enabled
The following filters are not in the correct format:
Force dark operation for web contents
When enabled, webpages will be forced to darken, which may cause some pages to behave abnormally.
Press one more time to exit game mode
Game mode is on, press the back key twice to exit
Tap the screen to grant camera permission \nto scan the code
History will not be recorded when you are in \"Incognito mode\".
Hold and drag or tap to add item
Hold and drag to rearrange items
Ignore this site message for a minute
Show images for a specific site.
Block images for a specific site.
Allow sites to load images only via Wi-Fi
The file is too large and cannot be imported
Import passwords from a CSV file

Ask first before allowing sites to know your location
Blocked list is in %1$s.\nYou can edit the list, or long-press the following item to enable/disable its blockade.
Username (the account will be created if not exist)
Please click on the ad area to mark it
This script has no metadata block so it cannot be saved. Do you want to add a default metadata block to it?
Are you sure you want to close all tabs?
Do you want to close all tabs before disabling incognito mode?
Downloaded file will also be deleted. Are you sure?
Are you sure you want to delete the following items?
Delete these download tasks (%1$d in total)?
Press one more time to exit
Would you like to resend the data?

SSL certificates are used to verify website identities and encrypt connection. It\'s like putting a letter in an envelope and posting it, only you and the website can open envelope and read the letter.\n\nOnce you ignore the SSL warnings, the connection to the website may be insecure, which means that the data transmitted with the website may be stolen. It\'s like putting the letter in a broken envelope and posting it, someone who forged the certificate could open it.
Are you sure you want to install \"%1$s\"(%2$s)?
Are you sure you want to delete the downloaded file and re-download %1$s?
Are you sure you want to re-install \"%1$s\"(%2$s)?
The storage permission for the download location has been revoked. Please re-select the download folder location.
Are you sure you want to reset site configuration for %1$s?
When using the address bar, suggest
By using Via, you agree to our %1$s and %2$s.
Are you sure you want to update \"%1$s\"(%2$s -> %3$s)?

Permission denied. Please go to settings and turn on \"Create home screen shortcuts\" permission for this app.
The website does not have a certificate.
The page has no network log.
These are saved webpages. You can open them even when you are offline.
Only take effect for the current site

You have saved this username and password on %1$s. Would you like to see it?
You are importing encrypted data. Please enter the password to decrypt the data and import it. If the password is incorrect, only the unencrypted data will be imported.
Used for taking photos or recording videos on websites
Used for voice input or audio recording on websites

Enable go back without reloading for a specific site.
Please read and agree to %1$s and %2$s
When enabled, the X-Requested-With and X-Wap-Profile headers will be empty, which may cause some pages to behave abnormally
Are you sure you want to update %1$s?
The script is incomplete and does not work, would you like to download the full script?
Show reader when clicking on the address bar\'s reader mode icon
Show menu first when clicking on the address bar\'s reader mode icon
This will take effect if JavaScript is enabled.
The following is the resource log on page load.
Are you sure you want to reset this script?
The resource does not exist and the script may not work properly. Do you want to download it?
\nIt is easier to detect media files while music or video is being played. Resource sniffer doesn\'t work on certain websites.
This will take effect the next time you open the app. Would you like to restart it now to take effect immediately?
Would you like to restore unclosed tabs from the last session?
Tabs will not be restored when you are in \"Incognito mode\".
Enable data-savings mode on compatible websites
The QR code has been saved to the gallery
Webpage has been saved to: Bookmarks > Saved pages
The data of these servers are not synchronized. You will be required to log in again.
Would you like to set it as homepage?
It will be set as default after opening link %1$s. Please choose Via to open the link.
It will take effect the next time you open Settings
Show toast to undo closing tab
The toast will not be shown if incognito mode is on

Via supports almost all Adblock Plus filters. 
You can block requests from example.com with a filter such as: 
||example.com^ (or simply: example.com) 

Wildcard is acceptable such as: 
||example.com/js/ads_*.js 

For webpage elements use a filter such as: 
example.com###ad 

You can unblock special requests with a filter such as: 
@@||example.com^

Metadata block
The metadata must follow the format:
// ==UserScript==
// @key value
// ==/UserScript==

@name: The name of the userscript.

@namespace: The combination of @namespace and @name is the unique identifier for a userscript.

@match/@exclude-match: Define rules to decide whether a script should be executed. It is recommended to use @match instead of @include.

@include/@exclude: The old way to decide whether a script should be executed.

@version: The version of the userscript.

@description: The description of the userscript.

@author: The author of the userscript.

@require: The require of the userscript. For example,
// @require https://my.cdn.com/jquery.js.

@run-at: Decide when the script will execute. document-start is used to inject scripts before the page loads, document-end is used to inject scripts after page load, document-idle is used to inject scripts after page is idle.

@grant: Specify which special GM_* APIs should be granted and can be used when the script executes.


@downloadURL: The URL the script can be downloaded from.

@supportURL: The support URL of the userscript.

@homepageURL: The homepage URL of the userscript.

GM_* APIs
GM_* are a group of special APIs provided by Via. Currently supported special APIs include:
GM_getValue/GM_setValue/GM_deleteValue/GM_listValues/GM_getResourceText/GM_getResourceURL/GM_addElement/GM_addStyle/GM_setClipboard/GM_xmlhttpRequest/GM_download/GM_registerMenuCommand/GM_unregisterMenuCommand.

Matching
@match defines a URL matching rule. @exclude-match defines a match rule but used to exclude the matched URLs, similar to @exclude.

For example:
// @match https://www.google.com/something
// @match https://www.google.com/any/*
// @exclude-match https://www.google.com/any/not_me
%1$s would like to use your location.
Domain in certificate does not match the site domain
Don\'t ask again for this browsing session
Connection to %1$s is not secure:\n%2$s\nProceed anyway?
Via has prevented the following page from loading:
Merge local data with remote data
Your current local bookmarks and settings will be overwritten. Continue?
Are you sure you want to override local data with remote data?
Overwrite local data with remote data
Are you sure you want to override remote data with local data?
Overwrite remote data with local data
Set the text size for a specific site.
The page has not fully loaded
The title can not be empty
Safe browsing allows WebView to protect against malware and phishing attacks by verifying the links
I know this may make connection insecure
Be careful, ignoring ssl certificate warnings may make connection to website insecure
Cookies for %1$s have been set to empty
Please choose another toolbar UI mode to enable the tab bar
This site does not support resource sniffing
Press a selected button below to set its long-press action, or long-press it to check what action has been set. You can also slide the toolbar to set the slide action.
TTS engine could not be initialized
Unable to add font, error code: %1$d
Your current local bookmarks and settings will be uploaded. Continue?
The user-agent can not be empty
Remove device information and minor version information from User-agent
The plain text content of the webpage.
Now you can connect your phone to computer, then debug the webpage with Chrome (PC) using \"chrome://inspect\". Remember to first enable USB Debugging in the menu: More Tools > Developer Tools.
